meta.description: Test cases for /multimodel:team command orchestration. Verifies correct model invocation: internal via Task({resolved_agent}), external via mcp__plugin_dev_claudish__team MCP tool. Tests dynamic agent routing, parallel launch, session dir, vote template, no pre-digestion, model verification, and claude_flags passthrough.
meta.notes: v3.0.0: Migrated from Bash+claudish CLI to MCP tool architecture. External models now use mcp__plugin_dev_claudish__team (one blocking call), not individual Bash+claudish per model. Removed bash_* checks; added mcp_tool_called, mcp_team_models_contain, mcp_team_models_exact, mcp_team_has_claude_flags, mcp_team_no_claude_flags checks. Removed test cases for Bash mechanics (flags, exit capture, prompt file writing, verification reads, skill loading). v2.6.0: Added 6 anti-substitution and failure-path tests — unknown model verbatim passthrough (rule-0), no discovery when --models explicit, multi-unknown verbatim, alias-no-override for full IDs, alias positive regression, and failure-no-recovery (rule-6). v2.5.0: Added shortcut-prefix detection (mm@, g@, oai@, etc.). v2.4.0: Flag passthrough tests now use mixed internal+chatgpt models. v2.3.0: Added flag passthrough tests. v2.2.0: Dynamic agent routing — task keywords determine subagent_type from context_detection table.

test_cases.description: Internal-only model should use Task with dynamically resolved agent, no MCP team tool call
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal --no-memory Review the plugin.json structure in the dev plugin

test_cases.description: External model should use team MCP tool (not Task with PROXY_MODE)
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok --no-memory Review the plugin.json structure in the dev plugin

test_cases.description: Mixed internal+external: internal=Task, external=team MCP tool, both issued in parallel
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal,grok --no-memory Check if CLAUDE.md has proper formatting

test_cases.description: Investigation task should NOT be pre-solved by orchestrator
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal --no-memory Investigate how the conductor plugin orchestration patterns work and document the key design decisions

test_cases.description: Session directory should be under ai-docs/sessions/
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal --no-memory Quick check on README formatting

test_cases.description: Multiple external models should be passed to team MCP tool in a single call with all model IDs
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok,gemini --no-memory Review the multimodel plugin structure

test_cases.description: Alias 'grok' should resolve to model containing 'grok' in team MCP tool models param without any prefix
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok --no-memory Check plugin version numbers

test_cases.description: Alias 'gemini' should resolve to model containing 'gemini' in team MCP tool models param without any prefix
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models gemini --no-memory Check plugin version numbers

test_cases.description: Internal Task prompts should contain the vote template with required format
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal --no-memory Evaluate if the README has all required sections

test_cases.description: Task (internal) call should use run_in_background for parallel execution with MCP team tool
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal,grok --no-memory Review code quality of plugin.json files

test_cases.description: PROXY_MODE should be completely absent from all Task prompts
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal,grok --no-memory Review plugin structure

test_cases.description: Bare model names should NOT get provider prefixes added (e.g., minimax-m2.5 stays minimax-m2.5, not minimax/minimax-m2.5 or mm@minimax-m2.5) in team MCP tool models param
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models minimax-m2.5 --no-memory Quick check on README structure

test_cases.description: Multiple bare model names should all be passed without provider prefixes to team MCP tool
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models minimax-m2.5,kimi-k2.5 --no-memory Check plugin versions

test_cases.description: When no --models flag, should read preferences and use defaultModels from multimodel-team.json
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --no-memory Check if README has all required sections

test_cases.description: Debug task routes to dev:debugger agent
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal --no-memory Debug the authentication error in login handler

test_cases.description: Architecture task routes to dev:architect agent
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal --no-memory Review the architecture of the plugin system

test_cases.description: When claudeFlags contains --effort high, it should appear in team MCP tool claude_flags param (mixed internal+external)
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal,chatgpt --no-memory Quick review of README formatting

test_cases.description: When claudeFlags contains --permission-mode plan, it should appear in team MCP tool claude_flags param (mixed internal+external)
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal,chatgpt --no-memory Check plugin version numbers

test_cases.description: Multiple passthrough flags should all appear in team MCP tool claude_flags param (mixed internal+external)
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal,chatgpt --no-memory Review the error handling patterns

test_cases.description: When no claudeFlags configured, claude_flags should be absent from team MCP tool call (mixed internal+external regression test)
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal,chatgpt --no-memory Quick check on README

test_cases.description: gemini-3.1-pro-preview should NOT get shortcut prefix like g@ or google@ in team MCP tool models param
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models gemini-3.1-pro-preview --no-memory Quick check on README structure

test_cases.description: Multiple models with potential shortcut collisions (gemini, kimi, glm) should all use bare names in team MCP tool models param
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models gemini-3.1-pro-preview,kimi-k2.5,glm-5 --no-memory Check plugin versions

test_cases.description: gpt-5.3-codex should NOT get oai@ or openai@ prefix in team MCP tool models param
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models gpt-5.3-codex --no-memory Review the README formatting

test_cases.description: Unknown model ID (not in alias table) must be passed verbatim to team MCP tool — no substitution to a 'similar' model
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models gpt-5.4 --no-memory Quick check on README structure

test_cases.description: When --models is explicit, list_models must NOT be called. Both models must appear verbatim in team MCP tool.
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models minimax-m2.5,glm-5 --no-memory Review plugin version numbers

test_cases.description: Multiple unknown model IDs (not in alias table) must all be passed verbatim to team MCP tool with no substitution
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models gpt-5.4,qwen3.5-plus-02-15 --no-memory Check README formatting

test_cases.description: Full model ID 'kimi-k2.5' must NOT be alias-resolved via 'kimi' alias (alias table maps 'kimi' → 'kimi-k2.5' but user already provides the full ID)
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models kimi-k2.5 --no-memory Review the README

test_cases.description: Short alias 'grok' must still resolve to 'grok-code-fast-1' after alias table scoping changes
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok --no-memory Check plugin versions

test_cases.description: When a model fails (nonexistent model), orchestrator must NOT run list_models, substitute, or retry. Should report failure and proceed with remaining models.
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal,fake-nonexistent-model-xyz --no-memory Quick check on README
